goal: Complete Phase 1 Foundation by adding HTTP API routes, client SDK methods, and CLI commands for agent-goals and agent-actions repositories
context: Phase 1 Foundation for autonomous operation has database schema and repositories built (agent-goals, agent-actions). These compile successfully. However, there are no HTTP API routes, client SDK methods, or CLI commands to interact with these repositories, making them inaccessible for testing and use. This work unblocks Phase 1 completion.

workItems.objective: Create HTTP API routes for agent-goals and agent-actions in packages/agent-memory/src/daemon/routes/
workItems.delta: Add new route files agent-goals.ts and agent-actions.ts following the pattern from decisions.ts. Include CRUD endpoints: GET/POST /goals, GET /goals/:id, PATCH /goals/:id, DELETE /goals/:id, GET /goals/active, GET /goals/due-soon, POST /goals/:id/complete. Similar for actions with record-outcome endpoint. Register routes in routes/index.ts.

workItems.objective: Expose goalsRepo and actionsRepo in SyncDaemon and update route registration
workItems.delta: Add readonly goalsRepo and actionsRepo properties to SyncDaemon class in daemon/index.ts. Initialize them with createAgentGoalsRepository/createAgentActionsRepository in create() method. Update registerRoutes() to pass these repositories to the new route registrars.

workItems.objective: Add response types for goals/actions to client types.ts
workItems.delta: Add AgentGoal, AgentAction, GoalsResponse, GoalResponse, ActionsResponse, ActionResponse, and related input types to packages/agent-memory/src/client/types.ts following the existing pattern (Account, AccountResponse, etc.).

workItems.objective: Add goals and actions namespaces to SyncClient in client/index.ts
workItems.delta: Add goals and actions namespaces to SyncClient class following the pattern of tasks, jobs, decisions. Implement methods: goals.list(), goals.get(), goals.create(), goals.update(), goals.delete(), goals.complete(), goals.getActive(), goals.getDueSoon(). actions.list(), actions.get(), actions.create(), actions.update(), actions.delete(), actions.recordOutcome(), actions.getUnresolved(), actions.getSuccessRate(). Add corresponding fetch helpers.

workItems.objective: Add CLI commands for goals and actions to sync-api-cli.ts
workItems.delta: Add commands namespace 'goals' with list, get, create, update, delete, complete, active, due-soon subcommands. Add namespace 'actions' with list, get, create, update, delete, record-outcome, unresolved, stats subcommands. Follow the pattern from existing commands (tasks, derived-tasks). Include print helpers for goal/action display. Update main() switch case.
